name: Patti Harrison
blurb: She drew wider attention for a 2017 Tonight Show set responding to a proposed ban on transgender people in the military.
bio: Patti Harrison is an American comedian, actress, and writer known for surreal alt-comedy and roles in I Think You Should Leave, Shrill, and the film Together Together. She drew wider attention for a 2017 Tonight Show set responding to a proposed ban on transgender people in the military.

timeline.ev: Performs a set on The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
Named one of Varietys 10 Comics to Watch
Begins recurring on I Think You Should Leave with Tim Robinson
Stars in the film Together Together

accolades: Independent Spirit Award nomination for Best Female Lead, Together Together
First transgender actor to voice a role in a Disney animated film, Raya and the Last Dragon

bits.t: Performs the Song She Wrote for Dua Lipa

bits.sp: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon

bits.yt_title: Patti Harrison Performs the Song She Wrote for Dua Lipa
Trump Bans Transgender People from Military, Comedian Patti Harrison Responds
